<$list filter="[all[tiddlers+shadows]tag[$:/tags/rimir/appify/app]sort[caption]]" emptyMessage="""<div class="appify-fab-empty">//No apps registered//</div>""">
<$button class="appify-fab-item">
<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/appify/active-app" text=<<currentTiddler>>/>
<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/appify/fab-open" text=""/>
<$action-setfield $tiddler={{{ [[$:/temp/rimir/appify/llm-chat/]addsuffix<currentTiddler>] }}} llm-help-context={{{ [all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/rimir/llm-help/page]get[llm-help-context]enlist-input[]] :filter[prefix[rimir/appify]] +[unique[]sort[]join[ ]] }}}/>
<$view field="caption"><$view field="title"/></$view>
</$button>
</$list>
</$reveal>
<$list filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/llm-connect]has[plugin-type]] [[$:/state/rimir/appify/active-app]get[text]!is[blank]] +[count[]match[2]]">
<$button class="appify-llm-fab-btn" tooltip="App Chat">
<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/appify/llm-chat-open" text={{{[[$:/state/rimir/appify/llm-chat-open]get[text]match[yes]then[no]else[yes]]}}}/>
{{$:/plugins/rimir/appify/icon/chat}}
</$button>
</$list>
<$button class="appify-fab-btn">
<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/appify/fab-open" text={{{[[$:/state/rimir/appify/fab-open]get[text]match[yes]then[]else[yes]]}}}/>
{{$:/plugins/rimir/appify/icon/fab-menu}}
</$button>
</div>
{{$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/llm-chat-panel}}
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/llm-chat-panel":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/llm-chat-panel","created":"20260318120000000","modified":"20260318120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\import [[$:/plugins/rimir/llm-connect/ui/chat-toolbar]]
\whitespace trim
<$reveal state="$:/state/rimir/appify/llm-chat-open" type="match" text="yes" animate="yes">
<div class="appify-llm-panel llm-chat-panel">
<div class="appify-llm-panel-header llm-chat-panel-header">
<<llm-chat-toolbar-left "App Chat">>
<span class="appify-llm-panel-header-actions llm-chat-panel-header-actions">
<$transclude $variable="llm-chat-toolbar-actions" chatTiddler={{{ [[$:/temp/rimir/appify/llm-chat/]addsuffix{$:/state/rimir/appify/active-app}] }}}/>
<$button set="$:/state/rimir/appify/llm-chat-open" setTo="no" class="tc-btn-invisible">×</$button>
</span>
</div>
<$wikify name="appifyPrompt" text={{$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/llm-prompt-template}}>
<$llm-chat
  chatTiddler={{{[[$:/temp/rimir/appify/llm-chat/]addsuffix{$:/state/rimir/appify/active-app}]}}}
  systemPrompt=<<appifyPrompt>>
  tools="[all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/rimir/llm-connect/tool]]"
  placeholder="Ask about this app..."
  protectionMode="deny"
  denyFilter="[tag[sensitive]]"
  defaultContext="rimir/appify rimir/typed tw-gotchas shortcuts"
/>
</$wikify>
</div>
</$reveal>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/llm-prompt-template":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/llm-prompt-template","created":"20260318120000000","modified":"20260318120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$let appTitle={{{[[$:/state/rimir/appify/active-app]get[text]]}}} layoutName={{{[[$:/state/rimir/appify/active-app]get[text]get[appify-layout]]}}} channels={{{[[$:/state/rimir/appify/active-app]get[text]get[appify-channels]]}}}>
<%if [<appTitle>!is[blank]]%>
You are an assistant for an appify app in TiddlyWiki.

Use llm_help to browse documentation — call llm_help("appify") to see available topics, then navigate deeper (e.g., llm_help("appify/channels")).

Your workflow:
1. Check the CURRENT STATE below to understand what app is active and its configuration.
2. If you need to learn HOW to do something, use llm_help to find relevant documentation.
3. Act using set_field (modify tiddler fields/text), create_tiddler, or wikitext_render (evaluate filters).

== CURRENT STATE ==
App: <<appTitle>>
Caption: <$text text={{{[<appTitle>get[caption]]}}}/>
Layout: <<layoutName>>

Channels:
<$list filter="[<channels>enlist-input[]]" variable="ch">
<$let stateTiddler={{{ [<appTitle>addprefix[$:/state/rimir/statewrap/]addsuffix[/]addsuffix<ch>] }}} defaultField={{{ [<ch>addprefix[appify-default-]] }}}>
- <<ch>>: current=`<$text text={{{[<stateTiddler>get[text]]}}}/>`  default=`<$text text={{{[<appTitle>get<defaultField>]}}}/>`  state_tiddler=`<<stateTiddler>>`
</$let>
</$list>

View bindings:
<$let layoutTiddler={{{ [[$:/plugins/rimir/appify/layouts/]addsuffix<layoutName>] }}}>
<$list filter="[<layoutTiddler>get[appify-slots]enlist-input[]]" variable="slot">
<$let viewField={{{ [<slot>addprefix[appify-view-]] }}} viewTitle={{{[<appTitle>get<viewField>]}}}>
- slot "<<slot>>" → <<viewTitle>>
</$let>
</$list>
</$let>

To change a channel: set_field(title="<state_tiddler from above>", field="text", value="new value")
To read/modify a view: get_tiddler then set_field(field="text", value="new wikitext")
<%else%>
No appify app is currently active.
<%endif%>
</$let>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-channel-rename":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-channel-rename","subtitle":"Rename Channel","footer":"<$button message="tm-close-tiddler">Cancel</$button>","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\function rename-input() [<app>addprefix[$:/temp/rimir/appify/channel-rename/]addsuffix[/]addsuffix<channel>]

<!-- app and channel variables are set by tm-modal params -->

Rename ''<<channel>>'' to:

<div class="appify-modal-row">
<$edit-text tiddler=<<rename-input>> field="text" tag="input" placeholder="New name" class="appify-modal-input" default=<<channel>>/>
<$button class="appify-modal-btn appify-modal-btn-primary">
<$action-appify-channel app=<<app>> operation="rename" channel=<<channel>> value={{{ [<rename-input>get[text]] }}}/>
<$action-deletetiddler $tiddler=<<rename-input>>/>
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-close-tiddler"/>
Rename
</$button>
</div>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-channels":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-channels","subtitle":"Channel Editor","footer":"<$button message="tm-close-tiddler">Close</$button>","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\function channel-state() [<app>addprefix[$:/temp/rimir/appify/channel-editor/]]
\function new-channel-input() [function[channel-state]addsuffix[/new-name]]
\function new-default-input() [function[channel-state]addsuffix[/new-default]]
\function rename-input() [function[channel-state]addsuffix[/rename/]addsuffix<ch>]
\function default-input() [function[channel-state]addsuffix[/default/]addsuffix<ch>]

<!-- app variable is set by tm-modal params -->

<div class="appify-modal-section">

!! Channels

<table class="appify-modal-table">
<tr><th>Name</th><th>Default</th><th>Actions</th></tr>
<$list filter="[<app>get[appify-channels]enlist-input[]]" variable="ch">
<$let defaultField={{{ [[appify-default-]addsuffix<ch>] }}}>
<tr>
<td class="appify-modal-cell-name"><<ch>></td>
<td class="appify-modal-cell-default">
<$edit-text tiddler=<<default-input>> field="text" tag="input" placeholder="(none)" class="appify-modal-input appify-modal-input-sm" default={{{ [<app>get<defaultField>] }}}/>
<$button class="appify-modal-btn appify-modal-btn-sm" tooltip="Save default">
<$action-appify-channel app=<<app>> operation="set-default" channel=<<ch>> value={{{ [<default-input>get[text]] }}}/>
<$action-deletetiddler $tiddler=<<default-input>>/>
✓
</$button>
</td>
<td class="appify-modal-cell-actions">
<$button class="appify-modal-btn" tooltip="Rename channel">
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-modal" $param="$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-channel-rename" app=<<app>> channel=<<ch>>/>
✎
</$button>
<$button class="appify-modal-btn appify-modal-btn-danger" tooltip="Delete channel">
<$action-appify-channel app=<<app>> operation="delete" channel=<<ch>>/>
✕
</$button>
</td>
</tr>
</$let>
</$list>
</table>

</div>

<div class="appify-modal-section">

!! Add Channel

<div class="appify-modal-row">
<$edit-text tiddler=<<new-channel-input>> field="text" tag="input" placeholder="Channel name" class="appify-modal-input"/>
<$edit-text tiddler=<<new-default-input>> field="text" tag="input" placeholder="Default (optional)" class="appify-modal-input"/>
<$button class="appify-modal-btn appify-modal-btn-primary">
<$action-appify-channel app=<<app>> operation="add" channel={{{ [<new-channel-input>get[text]] }}} value={{{ [<new-default-input>get[text]] }}}/>
<$action-deletetiddler $tiddler=<<new-channel-input>>/>
<$action-deletetiddler $tiddler=<<new-default-input>>/>
Add
</$button>
</div>

</div>

<!-- end modal -->
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-clone":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-clone","created":"20260319120000000","modified":"20260319120000000","subtitle":"Clone App","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\whitespace trim
<div class="appify-modal-section">

Create a copy of this app and its view tiddlers in your own namespace.

<div class="appify-modal-row">
<label>Name</label>
<$edit-text tiddler="$:/state/rimir/appify/clone-name" tag="input" class="appify-modal-input" placeholder="My App"/>
</div>

<div class="appify-modal-row">
<label>Prefix</label>
<$edit-text tiddler="$:/config/rimir/appify/clone-prefix" tag="input" class="appify-modal-input" default="$:/config/rimir/appify"/>
</div>

<div style="font-size: 12px; color: <<colour muted-foreground>>; margin: 4px 0 12px 0;">
App → <code><$text text={{{[[$:/config/rimir/appify/clone-prefix]get[text]else[$:/config/rimir/appify]addsuffix[/apps/]addsuffix{$:/state/rimir/appify/clone-name}]}}}/></code>
</div>

<$button class="appify-modal-btn appify-modal-btn-primary">
<$action-appify-clone source=<<app>> name={{$:/state/rimir/appify/clone-name}}/>
<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/appify/clone-name" text=""/>
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-close-tiddler"/>
Create Clone
</$button>

</div>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-debug":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-debug","subtitle":"Debug Inspector","footer":"<$button message="tm-close-tiddler">Close</$button>","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<!-- app variable is set by tm-modal params -->

<div class="appify-modal-section">

!! App Info

<table class="appify-modal-table">
<tr><td>''Title''</td><td><<app>></td></tr>
<tr><td>''Layout''</td><td>
<$let currentLayout={{{ [<app>get[appify-layout]] }}}>
<div class="appify-modal-layout-list">
<$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/rimir/appify/layout]sort[caption]]" variable="layout">
<$let layoutName={{{ [<layout>removeprefix[$:/plugins/rimir/appify/layouts/]] }}}>
<%if [<layoutName>match<currentLayout>] %>
<span class="appify-modal-btn appify-modal-btn-active"><$text text={{{ [<layout>get[caption]] ~[<layoutName>] }}}/></span>
<%else%>
<$button class="appify-modal-btn">
<$action-appify-layout app=<<app>> layout=<<layoutName>>/>
<$text text={{{ [<layout>get[caption]] ~[<layoutName>] }}}/>
</$button>
<%endif%>
</$let>
</$list>
</div>
</$let>
</td></tr>
<tr><td>''Instance ID''</td><td><code><<app>></code></td></tr>
</table>

</div>

<div class="appify-modal-section">

!! Channel State

<table class="appify-modal-table">
<tr><th>Channel</th><th>State Tiddler</th><th>Current Value</th><th>Default</th></tr>
<$list filter="[<app>get[appify-channels]enlist-input[]]" variable="ch">
<$let
  stateRef={{{ [[$:/state/rimir/statewrap/]addsuffix<app>addsuffix[/]addsuffix<ch>] }}}
  defaultField={{{ [[appify-default-]addsuffix<ch>] }}}
>
<tr>
<td class="appify-modal-cell-name"><<ch>></td>
<td><code><$text text=<<stateRef>>/></code></td>
<td>
<$transclude $tiddler=<<stateRef>> $field="text">
<em class="appify-debug-empty">(empty)</em>
</$transclude>
</td>
<td>
<$text text={{{ [<app>get<defaultField>] ~[[(none)]] }}}/>
</td>
</tr>
</$let>
</$list>
</table>

</div>

<div class="appify-modal-section">

!! Rules Summary

<!-- Rules are parsed into temp tiddler by the button that opens this modal -->
<$let rulesTemp={{{ [[$:/temp/rimir/appify/rules/]addsuffix<app>] }}}>
<$let rulesJson={{{ [<rulesTemp>get[text]] }}}>

<%if [<rulesJson>!is[blank]] %>
<$list filter="[<rulesTemp>jsonindexes[]]" variable="ruleIdx">
<$let ruleWhen={{{ [<rulesTemp>jsonget<ruleIdx>,[when]] }}}>
<div class="appify-modal-rule-summary">
When ''<<ruleWhen>>'' changes:
<ul>
<$list filter="[<rulesTemp>jsonget<ruleIdx>,[actions]jsonindexes[]]" variable="actIdx">
<$let
  actChannel={{{ [<rulesTemp>jsonget<ruleIdx>,[actions],<actIdx>,[channel]] }}}
  actValue={{{ [<rulesTemp>jsonget<ruleIdx>,[actions],<actIdx>,[value]] }}}
>
<li>Set ''<<actChannel>>'' to <%if [<actValue>is[blank]] %><em>(empty)</em><%else%>"<<actValue>>"<%endif%></li>
</$let>
</$list>
</ul>
</div>
</$let>
</$list>
<%else%>
<p class="appify-modal-empty">No rules defined.</p>
<%endif%>

</$let>
</$let>

</div>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-delete":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-delete","created":"20260319120000000","modified":"20260319120000000","subtitle":"Delete App","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\whitespace trim
<div class="appify-modal-section">

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/theme/callout" type="danger">
<$fill $name="body">
This will permanently delete the app and all its view tiddlers. This cannot be undone.
</$fill>
</$transclude>

<div style="margin: 12px 0;">
<strong>App:</strong> <<app>><br/>
<strong>Views:</strong>
<$list filter="[<app>fields[]prefix[appify-view-]]" variable="field">
<div style="margin-left: 16px;"><code><$text text={{{[<app>get<field>]}}}/></code></div>
</$list>
</div>

<$button class="appify-modal-btn appify-modal-btn-primary" style="background: <<colour alert-highlight>>; border-color: <<colour alert-highlight>>;">
<$action-appify-delete app=<<app>>/>
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-close-tiddler"/>
Delete App
</$button>

</div>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-rules":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/appify/ui/modal-rules","subtitle":"Rule Editor","footer":"<$button message="tm-close-tiddler">Close</$button>","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\function rules-temp() [<app>addprefix[$:/temp/rimir/appify/rules/]]
\function add-when-input() [<app>addprefix[$:/temp/rimir/appify/rule-editor/]addsuffix[/add-when]]
\function add-channel-input() [<app>addprefix[$:/temp/rimir/appify/rule-editor/]addsuffix[/add-channel]]
\function add-value-input() [<app>addprefix[$:/temp/rimir/appify/rule-editor/]addsuffix[/add-value]]

<!-- app variable is set by tm-modal params -->
<!-- Rules are parsed into temp tiddler by the button that opens this modal -->

<div class="appify-modal-section">

!! Current Rules

<$let rulesJson={{{ [<rules-temp>get[text]] }}}>
<%if [<rulesJson>!is[blank]] %>

<table class="appify-modal-table">
<tr><th>When</th><th>Actions</th><th></th></tr>
<$list filter="[<rules-temp>jsonindexes[]]" variable="ruleIdx">
<$let
  ruleWhen={{{ [<rules-temp>jsonget<ruleIdx>,[when]] }}}
>
<tr>
<td class="appify-modal-cell-name"><<ruleWhen>></td>
<td>
<$list filter="[<rules-temp>jsonget<ruleIdx>,[actions]jsonindexes[]]" variable="actIdx">
<$let
  actChannel={{{ [<rules-temp>jsonget<ruleIdx>,[actions],<actIdx>,[channel]] }}}
  actValue={{{ [<rules-temp>jsonget<ruleIdx>,[actions],<actIdx>,[value]] }}}
>
<div class="appify-modal-rule-action">set ''<<actChannel>>'' to "<<actValue>>"</div>
</$let>
</$list>
</td>
<td class="appify-modal-cell-actions">
<$button class="appify-modal-btn appify-modal-btn-danger" tooltip="Delete rule">
<$action-appify-rule app=<<app>> operation="delete-rule" when=<<ruleWhen>>/>
✕
</$button>
</td>
</tr>
</$let>
</$list>
</table>

<%else%>
<p class="appify-modal-empty">No rules defined.</p>
<%endif%>

</$let>

</div>

<div class="appify-modal-section">

!! Add Rule Action

<div class="appify-modal-row">
<label>When</label>
<$select tiddler=<<add-when-input>> field="text" class="appify-modal-input">
<option value="">-- select channel --</option>
<$list filter="[<app>get[appify-channels]enlist-input[]]" variable="ch">
<option value=<<ch>>><<ch>></option>
</$list>
</$select>
</div>

<div class="appify-modal-row">
<label>Set channel</label>
<$select tiddler=<<add-channel-input>> field="text" class="appify-modal-input">
<option value="">-- select channel --</option>
<$list filter="[<app>get[appify-channels]enlist-input[]]" variable="ch">
<option value=<<ch>>><<ch>></option>
</$list>
</$select>
</div>

<div class="appify-modal-row">
<label>To value</label>
<$edit-text tiddler=<<add-value-input>> field="text" tag="input" placeholder="Value (empty to clear)" class="appify-modal-input"/>
